name: Closeout Bowl
purpose: Sunday dinner to use remaining prepared bases without a new cooking process.
equipment: microwave, pan, or Ninja air fryer

ingredients.item: remaining batch chicken or turkey chili mince
Garlic Yogurt Sauce or Greek yogurt
Greek salad components or hot vegetables

instructions: Choose remaining protein: chicken with Garlic Yogurt Sauce, or turkey with Greek yogurt.
Choose remaining carb: rice or potato wedges.
Assemble in bowl with sauce and vegetables/Greek side.
Adjust portion based on remaining daily hunger and protein target.
reheating: Reheat hot components only; add sauce after heating.
substitutions: Canned tuna can replace cooked protein if no leftovers remain.
meal_prep_notes: Designed to close the week without extra cooking.
why_it_fits_weekly_plan: Prevents waste and keeps Sunday low-friction.
